3175140.name: Click and Tower
3175140.description:
Click and Tower is a strategic mix of tower defense, resource management, and long-term progression. Build and upgrade turrets to protect your town, collect resources, and survive waves of evolving enemies.

As you play, you’ll unlock new tower types, discover rare resources, and expand your camp into a fortified base. Some upgrades carry over between runs, letting you start stronger each time and push further than before.

Features include:

  • Three distinct turret types with multiple upgrade paths

  • A growing variety of enemy types and attack patterns

  • Resource gathering, research, and tech progression

  • Expanding your base with unlockable structures and systems

  • Persistent unlocks that carry into future playthroughs

  • A rewarding gameplay loop focused on growth, strategy, and replayability

Click to build, build to survive, survive to grow.
